TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Setting.EnableControlPa: Show or hide the draggable control panel UI only.
Show or hide the top portrait panel for scene tokens.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Notification.OverlayEna: Overlay enabled: wounds, resilience, and status highlights.

TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Wounds.Title: Wounds
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Wounds.Descript: Left-click adds 1 wound. Right-click removes 1 wound.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Attack.Title: Attack
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Attack.Descript: Attack roll. Left-click attacks. Drag to a target for quick targeting. Hold Shift for manual mode.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Defence.Title: Defence
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Defence.Descrip: Defence roll. Left-click defends. Hold Shift for manual mode.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.RollModifier.De: Left-click adds 1 bonus die. Right-click adds 1 penalty die. Shift + left-click cycles Common, Glorious, and Grim.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Resilience.Desc: Resilience value used for durability and damage resolution thresholds.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.ActorType.Stand: Standard NPC type without wound thresholds.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.ActorType.Champ: Champions do not use wound thresholds and track wounds normally.

TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Panel.Wounds.In: Left click: +1 wound · Right click: -1 wound · Shift+click: roll on wounds · Ctrl+click: reset to 0
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Panel.MiscastDi: Left click: +1 die · Right click: -1 die · Shift+click: roll miscast table · Ctrl+click: reset to 0
Click: pick target then auto-roll unarmed attack (Brawn vs Endurance). Shift+click: self auto-roll. Alt+click: pick target then open default attack dialog. Alt+Shift+click: open default self-roll dialog.

Click: pick target, then auto-roll attack. Shift+click: auto-roll self attack. Alt+click: pick target, then open default Foundry attack dialog (no auto-roll). Alt+Shift+click: open default Foundry self-roll dialog (no auto-roll). Ctrl+click: instantly reload this weapon (ranged weapons with reload flow only).
Reload progress: {current} / {target} successes.
Extra properties
Click: auto-flow action (auto-roll / auto-pick first). Alt+click: default Foundry action dialogs.
Click: pick target then auto-roll. Shift+click: self auto-roll. Alt+click: pick target then manual dialog. Alt+Shift+click: self manual dialog.
Click: pick target then auto-flow. Shift+click: self auto-flow. Alt+click: pick target then manual dialogs. Alt+Shift+click: self manual dialogs.
Click: auto-pick first skill and auto-roll. Alt+click: manual skill selection/dialogs.
Click: auto defence. Alt+click: manual defence selection dialog.
Click: roll on the miscast table. Ctrl+click: reset accumulated and potency values to 0.
Click: auto-roll casting test with current roll modifiers to accumulate power. Alt+click: open default manual casting dialog. Ctrl+click: reset accumulated and potency values to 0.
Click: run selected Recover action with auto flow. Alt+click: open default Recover chooser dialog.
Click: auto-roll manoeuvre checks (no dialogs). Alt+click: default Foundry manoeuvre flow (with dialogs).
Right click: remove temporary effect.
Left click: show details.

Click: cast and auto-process Apply buttons (with target pick when needed). Shift+click: same cast flow, but using only currently selected targets (no target pick mode, no self fallback). Alt+click: pick target then cast manually (no auto-apply).
